name: build-ios-with-limrun
description: Build iOS apps using Limrun cloud with workflows for App Intents, SwiftUI UI work, refactors, performance audits, and simulator debugging.

interface.shortDescription: Build, refine, and debug iOS apps with App Intents, SwiftUI, and Xcode workflows
interface.longDescription: Use Build iOS Apps to design App Intents and App Shortcuts, build or refactor SwiftUI UI, adopt modern iOS patterns such as Liquid Glass, audit runtime performance, and build, run, and debug apps on Limrun cloud iOS simulators.
interface.defaultPrompt: Design App Intents or App Shortcuts, build or refactor SwiftUI UI, audit performance, adopt modern iOS APIs, or debug an app on a simulator
